title: Farmers Expanse
description: An add-on to Farmers delight to add plenty of Dishes
body: ## About As an Add-on to [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) this mod will add to your experince a plethera of meals and things to cook/make ![Simple look](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ccd36ed7b8fdf762f791af90d48121ed7e0869b8.png) ## Features ### Soups You got Soups of plenty such as cactus, carrot, fish noodle and many more! ### Donuts You also have yourself donuts of many flavors from Plain to Melon and even SLIME! ### Hamburgers and Sandwiches Adding a a bit more variety to your Burger and Sandwich needs! ### Oats as of 0.0.4 we now have oats and foods with it. Find wild crops out in the Tiaga Biome. ## F&Q ### Will this be all? NO! I plan on making this a one stop add-on for farmers delight. I will be adding lots of crops and Meals. ### Backwards port to [Insert older MC_VERSION]? No, I'm one man I need money to live so I need time to work. If you want such things consider supporting me I may be able to full time Mod. ### Can I request Meals or ingredients? Of course, I'll gladly take requests, Join me at my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/B5xbua69nK). I'll be there to take request and hangout with people. ## Mods I wish to credit becouse of the insperation they gave me I modify recipes to fit farmers delight. I don't steal assets or code. [Rustic Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/rustic-delight) The bottle I love, made a modified version of it here [Pam's Harvestcraft 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/pams-harvestcraft-2-food-core) A lot of ideas are from here. [More Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-delight) I got the Plain Burger Texture from here, I thought it was perfect and didn't need to be redone. Please support this mod. ## Support Do you want to support the devolpment, help me out here [Buy Me Coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/greddode)
